prompt: A dramatic Japanese anime movie poster in a dark action-thriller style, vertically composed like a theatrical one-sheet. The background is a school campus and city street engulfed in flames at night, with blazing orange fire, black smoke, flying embers, shattered structures, rain-slick pavement, and a cinematic apocalyptic atmosphere. In the top half, show 2 large opposing character close-ups in profile facing inward: on the left, a teenage boy with tousled medium brown hair, pale skin, and a serious expression, wearing a dark school uniform jacket and white shirt; on the right, a teenage girl with long dark hair tied back, pale skin, and an intense expression, also in a school uniform with a red ribbon at the collar. Between them, place a reflective knife blade angled upward, catching the firelight. Add a vertical Japanese tagline in the upper center, white serif text, reading この夏、隠された絆が運命を変える―. Across the middle, place a huge layered title in Japanese with distressed metallic texture, heavy cinematic typography, motion slashes, sparks, and red-to-blue contrast, reading 私立 あかつき学園, with a smaller Japanese subtitle above it reading "絆とスパイと夏". Directly below, add the English subtitle in bold silver blockbuster lettering: THE SUMMER WITH SHADOW BONDS. In the bottom half, show 1 full-body action scene of a determined teenage schoolgirl riding a blue sport motorcycle at high speed through the burning campus street. She has short brown hair whipping in the wind, a fierce focused stare, a short-sleeved white school shirt, loosened red tie, plaid skirt, fingerless black gloves, and black shoes. Her pose is low and aggressive over the handlebars, as if in pursuit or escape. The motorcycle is sleek and angular with bright headlights and visible decals including "Shinobi" on the fairing and "250R" on the exhaust. Include 1 pursuing police car with flashing red and blue lights in the right background. At the very bottom, add small Japanese film-credit style text lines and a release line in gold and white reading 2025.夏 ROADSHOW. Use ultra-detailed anime illustration, high contrast lighting, glossy reflections, dramatic rim light, intense orange-and-blue color grading, dynamic perspective, premium modern anime poster design, and the polished look of a high-budget theatrical key visual.
